channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Compare 3 ways to push real-time data
item.description: Choose SSE for dashboards, WebSockets for chat, long polling as fallback — benchmarked on Node 20 LTS and Redis 7.2 with real cost and latency numbers.

item.title: 2026 Salary Split: Fine-Tuning vs Prompt Engineering
item.description: Fine-tuning pays 40% more than prompt engineering in 2026 — real salary data, benchmarked costs, and the exact metric to check before you train.

item.title: RAG in prod: prompt assembly kills latency
item.description: Cut RAG latency 80% by moving prompt assembly to Rust and caching by prompt hash — the real bottlenecks tutorials never mention.

item.title: Portfolio: one project, remote hire
item.description: Ship one project, get hired remotely — stop grinding LeetCode and open-sourcing forks. Focus on one system that proves you can own a pain point and move a metric. Real examples from Nairobi, Lagos, and Dar es Salaam.

item.title: Ask for 25% more: salary negotiation script
item.description: Increase remote salary 25% with a PPP table and FX-indexed retainer — real 2026 figures and email template you can use today.

item.title: Break the max pool size myth
item.description: The conventional wisdom (and why it's incomplete) For years, the standard advice on database connection pooling has been simple: set to the number of…

item.title: Senior devs flee Big Tech’s invisible drag
item.description: Cut engineering toil 70% with cache fixes — connection pooling, TTLs, and the cache stampede mistake most teams miss. Learn the real reasons senior developers quit Big Tech.

item.title: Break rate limits clients won't hate
item.description: Sliding-window rate limiting cut 429 errors 97% with 2 ms Redis latency — Lua script, Envoy sidecar, and the metric you should alert on today.

item.title: Lock contention kills bigger pools
item.description: Cut database latency 70% with the right connection pool size — the formula most teams copy from 2018 benchmarks is wrong. Learn the three real rules to stop limping or crashing.

item.title: Pick the right realtime tech for 2026
item.description: Cut real-time comms latency 60%: compare WebSockets, SSE, and long polling with Node 20 LTS, Python 3.12, and Redis 7.2 benchmarks

item.title: Scale kills RAG pipelines—here’s why
item.description: Cut RAG latency 89% and costs 77% with RedisSearch + FAISS + Elasticsearch — the exact stack, configs, and mistakes a Vietnam SaaS team made in 2026

item.title: Show problems, land remote jobs
item.description: Portfolio that hires you remotely in 2026: show fixes, not features. Includes 3 real incidents, code snippets, and a 30-minute action step.

item.title: Beat the $120k US offer when you're paid in pesos
item.description: Land remote jobs: negotiate salary like a pro — use a local cost-of-living index, FX hedging, and employer risk models to secure 2.2x–3.8x local rates from US/EU companies

item.title: Why senior devs quit FAANG in 2026
item.description: By the end of 2025, a 2024 Stack Overflow survey found that 38% of developers with 3–5 years of experience had left a company within two years — not for…

item.title: AI code hides 5 deadly permissions
item.description: Catch AI-generated security flaws in 15 minutes — 5 traps teams miss, real PR examples, and the exact Semgrep rules to block them before merge

item.title: Senior exodus: why scale kills joy
item.description: Cut on-call pages 70% with connection pooling and timeouts — the real reasons seniors leave big tech and how to fix them

item.title: Anchor remote pay to global rates
item.description: Close remote salary gaps 21% with Levels.fyi data — Python 3.11 scripts, ObservableHQ dashboard, and email templates that shift the negotiation from cost to market rate.

item.title: Database pools are too small by default
item.description: Cut database connection timeouts and outages 80% by abandoning the default pool size. Learn how to set max pool size, timeouts, and budgets that actually work in 2026.

item.title: 2026 AI salaries: which skills pay
item.description: Cut AI salary stagnation in 2026: prompt observability vs fine-tuning salaries compared with real data, benchmarks, and cost figures.

item.title: Compare WebSockets, SSE, long polling
item.description: Cut 30 % of realtime costs with the right transport — p95 latency, CPU, and memory at 2 k concurrent users on Node 20 + Redis 7.2 in 2026
